source: [Alibaba Embedding] Billion-scale Commodity Embedding for E-commerce Recommendation in Alibaba (Alibaba 2018)

concepts.finding: Three graph embedding methods for 2 billion items: BGE (Base Graph Embedding via DeepWalk on item graph from user behavior), GES (with side information - category, brand, price), EGES (Enhanced with weighted aggregation of side information). Weighted item graph from session sequences outperforms CF co-occurrence.
concepts.implication: Side information (category, brand, price range) can bootstrap cold-start keyword embeddings. When a keyword has few co-occurrences, its side information (language, domain, topic labels) can provide signal via weighted aggregation.
concepts.open_question: What side information (synonyms, categories, language, domain) should weight into keyword embeddings for cold keywords?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: EGES-weighted side information embeddings improve cluster assignment accuracy for low-frequency ('tail') keywords by 10%+ over unweighted aggregation.
